subject: [VID] v1.16+ compatible templates
commit_message:
[VID] v1.16+ compatible templates

Make VID templates v1.16+ compatible
Make logging sidecar optional
Add security context

- changing the configuration files with variables given by helm chart

- we unarchive at Docker container generation
- we change the configuration at preboot
